events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's big day
angles.copy: Peace and love, everyone! The legendary Ringo Starr is 86 today. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums or vocals?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: May's milestone
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and rock royalty. What's your favourite Queen riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's birthday groove
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Sir Mick Jagger is 83 today. What's your ultimate Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV's 45th Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV changed music forever! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' kicked it all off. What's the first music video you remember seeing?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, becoming the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe anniversary
angles.copy: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' is 32! That album defined a generation. What's your favourite track from their debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a field for three days of peace, love, and music. Happy anniversary, Woodstock!

events.title: Elvis Presley would have been 91
events.blurb: Remembering Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering Elvis
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91. His legacy lives on.

events.title: Tupac Shakur would have been 55
events.blurb: Remembering influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died six days later. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac tribute
angles.copy: Today we reflect on the incredible talent of Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55. His music continues to resonate.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Remembering guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Tribute to Hendrix
angles.copy: The world lost a true visionary on this day in 1970. Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84, and his unparalleled genius.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history! What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that still commands attention. What's your top Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's big day
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic solo single 'Imagine' was released on October 11, 1971, in the US and in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message that resonates just as much today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, and it became available on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: iPod's quarter-century
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day marks the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Happy 007 Day!
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating decades of martinis (shaken, not stirred) and iconic theme tunes. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles co-founder John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the profound impact of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
